title: Launching of the new Guinness Smooth GES 65cl x12
html:
G3-Biz Ltd Partners with Guinness Cameroon to Launch the New Guinness Smooth GES 65cl x12 in Limbe
As one of the trusted partners of Guinness Cameroon, G3-Biz Ltd is proud to join in the launch of the new Guinness Smooth GES 65cl x12, right here in the vibrant city of Limbe.
This launch marks the 20th anniversary of the Guinness Smooth™ brand, a symbol of quality, richness, and consumer satisfaction. In celebration of this milestone, Guinness Cameroon introduces the GES 65cl—a larger size offering the same distinctive smoothness that consumers have loved over the years.
At G3-Biz Ltd, we remain committed to delivering value to our customers, and this new format is a reward for their loyalty to the Guinness Smooth brand. It’s bigger, bolder, and just as smooth.
We’re excited to continue building this journey with Guinness Cameroon, bringing trusted products and rewarding experiences to our community.
